calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: ACCOUNTING #1, REPORT, FEES, FINAL DISTRIBUTION
Off Calendar Sep-16-2010 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deidre Von Rock-Ricci for Danita Dunigan (Petitioner).

Ms. Von Rock-Ricci addresed the issue of the extraordinary fees, explained why some of the time entries were not detailed and the extent of services provided. The matter was taken under submission.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
